ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "mcu_phase" INTEGER /* MCU phase the movie belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "tomato_meter" INTEGER /* Tomatometer score */,
  "audience_score" INTEGER /* Audience score */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "production_budget" TEXT /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating (e.g., PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID for the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDb ID for the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status (e.g., pre-production, post-production, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend" TEXT /* Opening weekend revenue */,
  "domestic_box_office" TEXT /* Domestic box office revenue */,
  "worldwide_box_office" TEXT /* Worldwide box office revenue */,
  "first_weekend_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the first weekend */,
  "second_weekend_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the second weekend */,
  "third_weekend_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the third weekend */,
  "first_week_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the first week */,
  "second_week_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the second week */,
  "third_week_box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue for the third week */,
  "international_box_office" TEXT /* International box office revenue */,
  "domestic_opening_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the movie opened in domestically */,
  "international_opening_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the movie opened in internationally */,
  "domestic_screen_count" INTEGER /* Total number of screens the movie played on domestically */,
  "international_screen_count" INTEGER /* Total number of screens the movie played on internationally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the production company (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  "company_country" TEXT /* Country where the production company is based */,
  "company_url" TEXT /* URL to the production company's official website */,
  "company_founding_date" TEXT /* Date the production company was founded */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., independent, studio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of reviewer (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, IMDB) */,
  "review_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the review */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review received */,
  "review_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
